title: salix eleagnos var. angustifolia
intro: Salix eleagnos var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved willow or Russian willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the willow family (Salicaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of salicin and other compounds. The health benefits of Salix eleagnos var. angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
